prompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
userPrompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
expandedPrompt: A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a large, oversized head and sleepy eyes. The silhouette features a rounded mushroom cap atop a compact body, with a small, glowing staff held in one hand. The wizard has a gentle smile, conveying a sleepy yet friendly expression. Accessories include a starry night-themed robe with subtle glowing patches and a crescent moon badge. The character has delicate, translucent wings resembling mushroom gills, and soft, glowing sparkles surrounding the staff.

expandedContent:
{
  "title": "Sleepy Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "expandedPrompt": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a large, oversized head and sleepy eyes. The silhouette features a rounded mushroom cap atop a compact body, with a small, glowing staff held in one hand. The wizard has a gentle smile, conveying a sleepy yet friendly expression. Accessories include a starry night-themed robe with subtle glowing patches and a crescent moon badge. The character has delicate, translucent wings resembling mushroom gills, and soft, glowing sparkles surrounding the staff.",
  "subject": "blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes",
  "mood": "whimsical and dreamy",
  "palettePlan": { "primary": "sky blue", "secondary": "soft white", "accent": "glowing yellow" },
  "styleTags": ["cute mascot", "glossy SVG", "blue-avatar quality"],
  "visualChecklist": [
    "oversized mushroom cap head",
    "sleepy half-closed eyes",
    "small glowing staff",
    "starry night-themed robe",
    "crescent moon badge",
    "translucent gill-like wings",
    "gentle smile",
    "soft glowing sparkles"
  ],
  "requiredDetails": [
    "mushroom cap head",
    "glowing yellow staff",
    "sleepy eyes expression",
    "crescent moon badge"
  ],
  "requiredRenderableDetails": [
    { "id": "mushroom_cap", "label": "mushroom cap head", "acceptableShapes": ["capShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["head.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "staff", "label": "glowing staff", "acceptableShapes": ["staffShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["hand.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "wings", "label": "translucent wings", "acceptableShapes": ["wingShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["back.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "badge", "label": "crescent moon badge", "acceptableShapes": ["badgeShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["chest.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 }
  ],
  "forbiddenDetails": ["raw SVG", "HTML", "unvalidated custom shapes", "external images"],
  "qualityConstraints": ["oversized expressive head", "compact connected body", "readable silhouette", "valid renderer sockets only"]
}

rawReactCssCharacterContent:
{
  "componentName": "SleepyBlueMushroomWizard",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Sleepy Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "summary": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#38bdf8",
    "--dude-secondary": "#60a5fa",
    "--dude-accent": "#93c5fd",
    "--dude-eye": "#e0f2fe",
    "--dude-panel": "rgba(255,255,255,.18)",
    "--dude-mouth": "#0f172a"
  },
  "headShape": "mushroom",
  "bodyShape": "compact",
  "expression": "sleepy",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "mushroomCap", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "mushroomGills", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "spot", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "spot", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "robe", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "badge", "label": "crescent moon", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "magic-staff", "side": "right", "label": "glowing staff", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "eye", "expression": "sleepy", "tone": "eye" },
    { "type": "mouth", "expression": "gentle smile", "tone": "mouth" }
  ],
  "notes": ["Includes mushroom cap head, glowing staff, sleepy eyes expression, and crescent moon badge."]
}
